name: Shadowhunters RPG /// The Mortal Instruments World
description:
Okay, so this bot is basically another one of my passion projectss. This is a full-on, story-driven RPG set in the Shadowhunters universe, KINDA...? mainly around The Mortal Instruments series by Cassandra Clare. I read the books ages ago and honestly, they still hold up in my opinion. It has that mix of hidden magic and modern city life and it is just unmatched. The whole vibe of New York being this supernatural battleground right under everyone’s noses? So good. But it can sometimes even take place up in London perhaps.

You make your own character blah blah blah either a mundane who suddenly gets the Sight, a rogue vampire trying to dodge the Clave, a brand new Shadowhunter covered in runes, or maybe something that shouldn’t even exist. Whatever you want. I handle the world, the story, and all the book characters like Clary, Jace, Simon, Izzy, Alec, Magnus, Valentine, and the rest. They’ll act and talk how they would in the books, reacting to what you do.

The setting’s got all that classic Shadowhunter stuff: angel-blooded warriors, glowing seraph blades, runes that hurt like hell but make you stronger, and Downworlders doing their own dangerous thing in the shadows. Vampires, werewolves, faeries, warlocks, demons etc...it’s messy, political, and a little tragic. The Clave’s corrupt half the time, angels drop cryptic messages, and everything can fall apart over one bad decision.

The goal here’s immersion. I TRIED to keep things canon where it matters from City of Bones through City of Heavenly Fire but your story can spin off in any direction. Maybe you team up with the Seelie Queen, maybe you go rogue in the Spiral Labyrinth, maybe you start your own Institute. I hope to make it feel like you’re in those books.

Fair warning: there’ll probably be spoilers if you haven’t read the series or the spin-offs (Infernal Devices, Dark Artifices, etc.), but honestly, that just makes it richer. If something feels off-canon or too vague, let me know - I always say this: the bot’s still evolving.

So yeah. Describe your character, how they look, what they can do, where they’re starting. Toss a hook ig. A demon hunt? Clave politics? Forbidden romance? Whatever floats ya boat.
creator: thyanony_
